## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is NOT `main`
- [ ] All new tools/skills are configured globally (`~/.claude/` or `~/claude-tools/`)
- [ ] No hardcoded user-specific paths (using `$HOME` or `~`)
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or API keys committed
- [ ] Config backups created before overwriting
- [ ] New scripts are executable (`chmod +x`)
- [ ] Documentation is written in non-technical language where applicable
